Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute near 91st/Burley
ShortDescription: 30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

Northbound buses will operate via 91st, Buffalo, and 92nd including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via 92nd, Buffalo, and 91st.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #26 South Shore Express Temporary Northbound Reroute near 106/Muskegon
ShortDescription: Northbound 26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Torrence, 104th, Muskegon, 106th, due to, street blockage near 106th/ Muskegon.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Torrence, 104th, Muskegon, 106th, due to, street blockage near 106th/ Muskegon.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #22 Clark Temporary Reroute at Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: #22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Clark/Addison
